message:
Replace template placeholders with llm-d-latency-predictor (#7)

- Rename Go module to github.com/llm-d/llm-d-latency-predictor
- Update Makefile, Dockerfile, README, and issue templates
- Set OWNERS and CODEOWNERS to ahg-g (Abdullah Gharaibeh)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,4 @@
-# TODO: Replace with your team's GitHub usernames or team names
 # See https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/managing-your-repositorys-settings-and-features/customizing-your-repository/about-code-owners
 
 # Default owners for everything in the repo
-# * @llm-d/your-team
+* @ahg-g

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ body:
         Thank you for suggesting an improvement! Please fill in the details below.
 
         Before opening a new feature request, please check
-        [existing issues](https://github.com/llm-d/{{PROJECT_NAME}}/issues)
+        [existing issues](https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d-latency-predictor/issues)
         to see if a similar request already exists.
 
   - type: textarea

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# Multi-stage build for {{PROJECT_NAME}}
+# Multi-stage build for llm-d-latency-predictor
 # Supports multi-arch: linux/amd64, linux/arm64
 
 # --- Build stage ---

@@ -1,6 +1,5 @@
 # Project configuration
-# TODO: Replace {{PROJECT_NAME}} with your project name
-PROJECT_NAME ?= {{PROJECT_NAME}}
+PROJECT_NAME ?= llm-d-latency-predictor
 REGISTRY ?= ghcr.io/llm-d
 IMAGE ?= $(REGISTRY)/$(PROJECT_NAME)
 VERSION ?= $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo "dev")

@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
-# TODO: Replace with your team's GitHub usernames
 # See https://go.k8s.io/owners for format documentation
 
 reviewers:
-  # - github-username
+  - ahg-g
 
 approvers:
-  # - github-username
+  - ahg-g

@@ -1,12 +1,9 @@
-# {{PROJECT_NAME}}
+# llm-d-latency-predictor
 
-<!-- TODO: Replace {{PROJECT_NAME}} with your project name -->
-<!-- TODO: Update badges below with correct repo path -->
-
-[![CI](https://github.com/llm-d/{{PROJECT_NAME}}/actions/workflows/ci-pr-checks.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/llm-d/{{PROJECT_NAME}}/actions/workflows/ci-pr-checks.yaml)
+[![CI](https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d-latency-predictor/actions/workflows/ci-pr-checks.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d-latency-predictor/actions/workflows/ci-pr-checks.yaml)
 [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Apache%202.0-blue.svg)](LICENSE)
 
-> **One-line description of what this project does.**
+> **Latency prediction service for the llm-d ecosystem.**
 
 ## Overview
 
@@ -22,8 +19,8 @@
 
 ```bash
 # Clone the repo
-git clone https://github.com/llm-d/{{PROJECT_NAME}}.git
-cd {{PROJECT_NAME}}
+git clone https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d-latency-predictor.git
+cd llm-d-latency-predictor
 
 # Install pre-commit hooks
 pre-commit install
